content:
I need to count all inheritance (`<|--`) and implementation (`<|..`) relations from the diagrams.

Going through each relation:

1. `Error <|-- APIError`
2. `Error <|-- ValidationError`
3. `Error <|-- FileError`
4. `Error <|-- GitHistoryNotFoundError`
5. `IParser <|-- ILanguagePlugin`
6. `Error <|-- PluginError`
7. `PluginError <|-- PluginInitializationError`
8. `PluginError <|-- PluginConfigError`
9. `PluginError <|-- ToolDependencyError`
10. `PluginError <|-- ParseError`
11. `PluginError <|-- FileSystemError`
12. `GlobalConfig <|-- ArchGuardConfig`
13. `BaseExtractor <|-- ClassExtractor`
14. `BaseExtractor <|-- EnumExtractor`
15. `Error <|-- ParseError` (in Core_Layer extractors)
16. `BaseExtractor <|-- InterfaceExtractor`
17. `EventEmitter <|-- ParallelParser`
18. `BaseExtractor <|-- RelationExtractor`
19. `ResolveOptions <|-- OutputPathOptions`
20. `PathResolution <|-- ResolvedPaths`
21. `BaseArchJsonMapper <|-- ArchJsonMapper` (Cpp)
22. `IDependencyExtractor <|.. DependencyExtractor` (Cpp)
23. `ILanguagePlugin <|.. CppPlugin`
24. `BaseArchJsonMapper <|-- ArchJsonMapper` (Go)
25. `IDependencyExtractor <|.. DependencyExtractor` (Go)
26. `ILanguagePlugin <|.. GoPlugin`
27. `IGoAtlas <|.. GoPlugin`
28. `BaseArchJsonMapper <|-- ArchJsonMapper` (Java)
29. `IDependencyExtractor <|.. DependencyExtractor` (Java)
30. `ILanguagePlugin <|.. JavaPlugin`
31. `BaseArchJsonMapper <|-- ArchJsonMapper` (Python)
32. `IDependencyExtractor <|.. DependencyExtractor` (Python)
33. `ILanguagePlugin <|.. PythonPlugin`
34. `ILanguagePlugin <|.. TypeScriptPlugin`
35. `IAtlasBuilder <|.. CapabilityGraphBuilder`
36. `IAtlasBuilder <|.. FlowGraphBuilder`
37. `IAtlasBuilder <|.. GoroutineTopologyBuilder`
38. `IAtlasBuilder <|.. PackageGraphBuilder`
39. `RawClass <|-- MergedCppEntity`

{"answer": 39}
